fields.description: Wasser-Elektrolyse (H₂ für Brennstoff, Kraftstoff- und Grundstoff-Synthese)
Calculate status percentage: child status_ha ÷ parent status_ha × 100
Calculate target percentage: child target_ha ÷ parent target_ha × 100
Ziel formula for 1.4: 1.4 = 1.1.1.3.ziel + 1.2.5.ziel + 1.3.5.ziel (sum of three calculated ziel values)
Ziel formula for 2.1.2: 2.1.2 ziel = Zieleinfluss Wohnflächen-Entwicklung (to be calculated - placeholder for now)
Ziel formula for 2.4.2: 2.4.2 ziel = Veränderung zum Status (Ziel) = -44.9% from Excel
Ziel formula for 2.4.6: 2.4.6 ziel = L66*(1-M65%) + M60*M65%
Ziel formula for 2.7.3: 2.7.3 Ziel = 2.7.2_status - 2.7.2_ziel (Einsparung gegenüber Status relativ)
Ziel formula for 2.7.4: 2.7.4 Ziel = 2.6(ziel) × 2.7.3%(ziel) × 2.7%(ziel) (Einsparung gegenüber Status absolut)
Ziel formula for 4.0: 4.0(Ziel) = 4.1(Ziel) + 4.2(Ziel) (sum of direct children)
Ziel formula for 4.1: 4.1(Ziel) = 4.1.1(Ziel) + 4.1.2(Ziel) (sum of direct children)

fields.expression: (current_ueberschuss_strom * 0.65 if (current_stromverbr_raumwaerm_korr > 0 and current_ueberschuss_strom / current_stromverbr_raumwaerm_korr <= 1) else (current_stromverbr_raumwaerm_korr * 1 * 0.65 if current_stromverbr_raumwaerm_korr > 0 else 0))

(current_ueberschuss_strom * 0.65 if (current_stromverbr_raumwaerm_korr > 0 and current_ueberschuss_strom / current_stromverbr_raumwaerm_korr <= 1) else (current_stromverbr_raumwaerm_korr * 1 * 0.65 if current_stromverbr_raumwaerm_korr > 0 else 0))

(0 if (current_stromverbr_raumwaerm_korr > 0 and current_ueberschuss_strom / current_stromverbr_raumwaerm_korr <= 1.0) else (current_ueberschuss_strom - (current_einspeich / 0.65) if current_stromverbr_raumwaerm_korr > 0 else 0))

(0 if (current_stromverbr_raumwaerm_korr > 0 and current_ueberschuss_strom / current_stromverbr_raumwaerm_korr <= 1.0) else (current_ueberschuss_strom - (current_einspeich / 0.65) if current_stromverbr_raumwaerm_korr > 0 else 0))
